meaning: n.冰雹,致敬,招呼,一阵vt.向...欢呼,致敬,招呼,使象下雹样落下,猛发vi.招呼,下雹int.万岁,欢迎
examples: We drove through hail and snow.
Hail was hammering down onto the roof.
It started to hail, huge great stones.
With hopes dimming that Kaiba would survive, doctors tried the medical equivalent of a "Hail Mary" pass.
Currently, 25 percent of the players on minor league squads hail from the Dominican Republic.
